summary: Hydrated artifact reviewed as a live PR inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. No shared canonical is selected. All open PRs/issues are kept open or routed to item-scoped human review; security-linked #83451 is quarantined. No close, merge, label, comment, fix, or PR-opening action is planned because the job disables instant close, low-signal close, merge, and fix PRs.

actions.reason: Security-sensitive linked ref is out of scope for Clownfish backlog automation.
Keep the issue open while the linked fix PR remains unproven and unmerged.
Maintainer/product judgment is needed to decide whether #93099 is the right fix for #93031.
Useful-looking but broad open feature PR; keep open for normal review/proof outside this no-merge inventory shard.
Focused PR is not closable as low-signal or duplicate, and merge/fix actions are disabled.
Actionable review-bot findings and failing checks require author or maintainer follow-up; this worker cannot fix or merge.
Maintainer signal plus failed proof/preflight require human or author follow-up; no fix or merge is allowed in this job.
Keep open for proof/review; closing is disabled and the linked issue remains unresolved.
Provider feature/fix PR needs proof and technical review; no close or fix action is allowed.
This looks like a potentially useful focused bug fix, but merge and technical correctness judgment are outside this inventory job.
Keep open for proof/check cleanup; it is a focused P1 bug-fix PR, not low-signal or a duplicate.
Keep open for proof/maintainer review; this is not a duplicate closeout candidate.
The linked issue's root cause is disputed by source inspection, so technical/product judgment is needed before treating this PR as the fix.

needs_human: #93031: decide whether the reported cron migration root cause is valid and whether #93099 is the intended fix.
